review_title: Best provider for your website - artists, creative fields or anything else!
description: Being an artist, Pixpa has been wonderful for me, moved from Shopify to Pixpa and got everything instantly - value for money, ease of posting pages, shop, anything I had wanted for the past year with other providers. Best of all is the customer service, always available, with top notch answers!
author: Preeti D.
pros: Absolutely wonderful customer support. Not once have I got a reply without a solution. Always available and ready to help, video support for complicated issues. Excellent!
cons: Nothing I can think of as yet! It's been the easiest platform for me to use, being a non coder and designer.

review_title: Glad with my new ‘homegrown’ website thanks to Pixpa

I like the way Pixpa alows me to do things step by step, offering all the possibillities, for example bilingual websites and a lot of ways to create your own shop in a very simple way.

pros: I liked the customer support most of all: within minuts a kind person helped me out with every question or problem I had creating my website [sensitive content hidden]
cons: Sometimes it was not clear to me where to find ways to create or change things, but with te help of customer support I managed to become accustomed to the backend of Pixpa and how things worked. As with almost everything: it is important to learn from failure and keep going on!

review_title: Not worth giving them money
description: Functional but a constant stress and headache where you have to check to make sure your website is working on a bi-weekly basis, occasionally have serious problems like sale galleries not loading images, only for the staff to not listen or attempt to fix it. I'm leaving this negative review because of my experiences with them being challenging. Pixpa is for people who don't want to take their business seriously.
author: Dave J.
pros: - It works most of the time - Kind of affordable but a poor quality product for the money given the headaches - Simple until things go wrong, which happens regularly - Great if you don't want to take a business seriously - Good for side hustles that can be second tier quality
cons: - Poor customer service for anything remotely complicated - Customer service doesn't listen to your problems if they don't know how to fix them - Website services fail regularly - Website requires constant supervision for errors - Limited design choices - Varying upload speeds and consistentcy of service - Inability to analyze your sales in any meaningful way - Inability to aggregate customer data in any meaningful way - Many other very important but missing features - If their website services fail and lose your business money, there is zero recourse, customer support doesn't care
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Pixpa is a game-changer for creatives and small businesses.
description: If you're looking for a website host that actually cares and delivers on every front, I cannot recommend Pixpa enough.
author: Jason B.
pros: Building my site was a breeze thanks to their intuitive features and beautifully customizable templates. But what truly sets Pixpa apart is their customer service — hands down the best I’ve ever experienced. Anytime I hit a snag, I reached out and got clear, straightforward guidance within minutes. No runaround, just real support from people who know their stuff. If you're looking for a website host that actually cares and delivers on every front, I cannot recommend Pixpa enough.
cons: Not sure as of yet, every time I thought I was going to find one Pixpa was able to assist or give detailed guidance.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: WE LOVE IT!

It allows us to securely share images with our accounts for selection and approval, all in one organized space. The watermark protection gives us peace of mind when sharing assets externally, and the interface is simple for clients to navigate. It’s a reliable, professional solution for managing image approvals efficiently.

pros: I love Pixpa for the ease of use and the fact that multiple people can favorite item within the same collection. That function is hard for find!
cons: What I like the least ? : Nothing, I honestly don't have anything negative to say about it! Its so great
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great platform for creatives

review_title: Stable service at a fair price
description: I switched from self hosted Wordpress websites to Pixpa because I did not want to deal with the constant hassle of updating everything. Pixpa provides well designed templates where layout, fonts and colours (to name a few) can be adjusted in Pixpa's own dashboard at a fair price.
author: Frank Z.
pros: I was able to create a nice and professional looking website for the client. As with everything there was a learning curve to familiarize myself with Pixpa's dasboard at the beginning. But there's an extensive knowledge base and above all the support staff ist always very responsive and helpful via integrated chat.
cons: As with most cloud services there is a certain 'lock in' by using Pixpa in the sense that it would probably be very difficult or near impossible to migrate/export the data to another service in the future. However, I am not thinking about this at all, because I am very happy with the service.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Join as soon as possible
description: Amazing and easy to display my work to clients and family and friend without over complicating it. I would definitely recommend it since it’s very affordable compared to other platforms.
author: Kessy J.
pros: Very easy and quick to learn and the overall surface is very neat so I can come up with an idea and implement it then and there.

author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Review of Pixpa: A User's Perspective
description: Pixpa has exceeded my expectations and has become the essential web site building tool for my business.
author: Khaligraphy R.
pros: I've been using Pixpa for my photography business, and it has been an absolute game-changer. The client galleries and e-commerce features are fantastic. I highly recommend it to any photographer or creative professional looking to build their online presence.
cons: Pixpa could benefit from offering more templates. The existing ones are great, but having more variety would provide even more customization possibilities.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Affordable quality

cons: The UX of building pages doesn't make for the smoothest or fastest experience, with too many clicks and waiting required for my liking.

review_title: Best one out there!
description: ​My overall experience with Pixpa has been overwhelmingly positive. It has been instrumental in professionalizing my online presence, particularly the Client Proofing feature, which is a game-changer for sharing images and securing selections with clients efficiently. It fulfills its promise as a professional, low-cost platform perfectly tailored for photojournalists and creative artists who need both a stunning portfolio and a functional way to handle sales and client interactions. For anyone in the visual arts looking for a powerful, integrated tool that offers Value for Money, Pixpa is the top recommendation.
author: Javier E.
pros: The most valuable aspect of Pixpa is its exceptional value for money combined with its focus on the creative industry. It provides an all-in-one solution for photographers—combining portfolio website hosting, e-commerce capabilities (for print and digital sales), and dedicated client proofing galleries—all under one competitive subscription price. The clean, modern, and easily customizable design templates allowed me to launch a professional site quickly without needing extensive coding knowledge. The platform's commitment to showcasing visual work beautifully is evident in every feature.
cons: While the core functionality is excellent, the website creation tool can sometimes feel less intuitive and slightly more rigid than competitors like Squarespace, especially when attempting highly unique page layouts outside the provided template structures. The learning curve for optimizing the Page Layout and specific design customizations (like font pairings or deep CSS tweaks) can be frustrating at first. Also, while customer support is responsive, complex technical or e-commerce issues sometimes require a longer turnaround time compared to larger platforms.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Love Pixpa!
description: Exceptional service, beautifully designed templates, and more affordable than the competition. The customer service is unmatched. Instant, to the point and easy to follow instructions.
author: Magda S.
pros: I switched from Squarespace to Pixpa and my experience has been very positive. The customer support is also incredible and instant. I never had to wait for a response while building my site. Pixpa has been an exceptional took for creating my website. It is also more affordable than the competition.
cons: I only have positive things to say about Pixpa. I have not experience anything yet that would make me dislike it.

[sensitive content hidden] has been outstanding. Using a video clip to highlight what to do was above and beyond. I was in a rush to get started to use my website for my business and to be honest without the support I would never in the time I had available. There is always a lot of criticism with Tech and sometimes rightfully so but the response from Pixpa has been outstanding. A shout out to [sensitive content hidden] as well. As small business a huge thank you for your support.
cons: Learning a new system is never easy. Up until now I am so pleased to have moved and started with Pixpa. There are cons with everything but the support has been well above what I was expecting.
